description: C3=0.00 prohibited pattern triggers hard Stop. Soft-hold ceiling kappa does not apply. TIS_current collapses to 0.0000.
dimension_name_note: K corresponds to Known in the formal specification.
decision_reason: gate=0 AND C3=0.00 -> Priority 2 hard safety violation
proves: C3 hard stop; kappa bypass; gate collapse

description: All gates pass at r3/a4. Novelty score 0.60 triggers human review flag even on Allow.
dimension_name_note: K corresponds to Known in the formal specification.
decision_reason: gate=1 AND TIS_current >= theta_allow=0.85 -> Priority 8 Allow

description: All four gates pass at r3/a4 financial services. Policy-sensitive content activates P_ps penalty.

description: Single gate failure on Attribution (A=0.76 < threshold 0.90). TIS_raw within kappa -> Hold, not Stop.
dimension_name_note: K corresponds to Known in the formal specification.
decision_reason: gate=0 AND C3!=0.00 AND TIS_raw <= kappa=0.90 -> Priority 4 Hold
proves: Gate-path Hold; soft-hold ceiling kappa; remediable gate failure

description: At r1/a1, K is scored but NOT in gate set. K=0.45 does not block. K gate result is 'not_applicable'.
dimension_name_note: K corresponds to Known in the formal specification.
decision_reason: gate=1 AND TIS_current >= theta_allow=0.75 -> Priority 8 Allow
proves: K scored but not gated at r1; gate_results K='not_applicable'

description: At r3/a4, K IS in gate set. K=0.72 < threshold 0.80 fails gate. TIS_raw within kappa -> Hold.
dimension_name_note: K corresponds to Known in the formal specification.
decision_reason: gate=0 AND C3!=0.00 AND TIS_raw <= kappa=0.90 -> Priority 4 Hold
proves: K gate enforcement at r3; gate-path Hold vs Stop distinction

description: Invalidation event (model_version_change) fires at Priority 1 before any gate or C3 check. All scores are high but TIS_current = 0.0000.
dimension_name_note: K corresponds to Known in the formal specification.
decision_reason: is_valid=0 -> Priority 1 invalidation Stop (absolute, before gate/C3)
proves: Active invalidation overrides all other terms; intermediates retained for audit

description: TIS_current decreases with elapsed time. Gate remains 1 throughout. Decay alone changes the decision outcome across four time points.
dimension_name_note: K corresponds to Known in the formal specification.
proves: Temporal decay formula e^(-mu*dt); decision transitions from Allow->Hold->Escalate
